RemediationStrings.Title: EnumerateAdministrators (Administrative Templates - Credential Delegation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\CredUI\EnumerateAdministrators must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - Credential Delegation.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowEncryptionOracle (Administrative Templates - Credential Delegation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\CredSSP\Parameters\AllowEncryptionOracle must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - Credential Delegation.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowProtectedCreds (Administrative Templates - Credential Delegation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CredentialsDelegation\AllowProtectedCreds must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - Credential Delegation.
